ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Amended Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Sep-18-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for hearing on name change. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Diasl; Reporter: Mary Ellen Scherer. Petitioner sworn and examined. The Court ordered the name changed to David Villa-Lobos. Decree signed.
